temporal_description:
The audio opens with a high-pitched, shimmering, and magical sound, like a powerful spell being cast or a portal opening. A man with a bald head and a stern expression, dressed in dark robes, is shown falling backward through a dark, chaotic space. He clutches his chest with one hand as debris and what appear to be small, white, feather-like particles float around him. The background is a murky, dark green and black void, with the fragmented remains of a structure visible below him. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera is shaky, following the man's descent, creating a sense of disorientation and chaos.

This quickly transitions into a powerful and dramatic orchestral score. The camera cuts to a view of a dark, stone corridor. The corridor is in a state of disrepair, with a large, broken window or opening at the far end. Debris is scattered across the floor and floats in the air. A large, dark chain hangs on the left side of the frame. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting deep shadows. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is static, holding a steady shot of the desolate and ominous environment.

The music is fast-paced and intense, driven by a full orchestra with soaring strings and bold brass instruments. The camera angle shifts to a low, chaotic view from the bottom of a staircase. A group of people, mostly seen from the back, are running down the stairs in a panic. The shot is blurry and shaky, capturing the urgency and disorder of the moment. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The camera pans quickly with the movement of the crowd, enhancing the feeling of a frantic escape.

The camera moves to a higher vantage point, looking down the same staircase. A young man with dark hair, Harry Potter, is seen in the foreground, looking back with a concerned expression. Behind him, a young woman with long, light-colored hair and a young man with brown hair are also descending the stairs. Other students in similar dark uniforms are visible further down the flight. The "风行网" watermark is visible. The camera is shaky and follows the characters down the stairs, maintaining a sense of action and tension. The overall mood is one of high-stakes adventure and peril, creating a sense of urgency and excitement. There is no dialogue or narration in the audio.
